---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: "Suggest a new idea, enhancement, or project for NeuraCET."
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: "enhancement"
assignees: ""
---

### Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is (e.g., "I'm always frustrated when...").

### Describe the Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. What should the feature look or act like?

### Describe Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup designs, screenshots, or reference websites about the feature request here.
